assessment_items.question_content:
**The breastplate that is worn by Augustus of Primaporta reflects Greek political ideology.**

[[☃ radio 1]]

**In his ruler portraits, Augustus promoted an image of himself as  . . .**


![Augustus of Primaporta, 1st century C.E., marble, 2.03 m high (Vatican Museums)](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/055dc944602dceccb86cdb9b5eac6003.jpg)

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: **In his ruler portraits, the Emperor Augustus promoted the Greek ideals of youth and strength and makes himself look more like a god than a man. He is also shown here as a successful military leader. He does *not* show himself with the Roman Republican values of age and wisdom.**

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of the following are likely NOT represented on Augustus's breastplate?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: **Roman gods, personifications of tributary nations, and sphinxes are all represented on Augustus's breastplate.**

assessment_items.question_content:
**Imperial Roman portraits were commonly distributed throughout the empire;  this sculpture was found in $\_\_\_\_\_\_$.**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: **Ancient Romans distributed standardized likenesses of their emperor throughout the empire, but this sculpture was found in the vicinity of Rome, in the Villa of Livia (Augustus's wife) at Primaporta.**

choices.content: on the Palatine hill in Rome

assessment_items.question_content:
**The figure of Augustus most closely resembles the Greek Classical statue *Doryphoros* in order to recall the Golden Age of 5th century Athens. Which figure is the *Doryphoros*?**

![Augustus of Primaporta, 1st century C.E., marble, 2.03 m high (Vatican Museums)](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/e865797f9e74f6f16ba17844dcf2749e.jpg)

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: ![Figure standing in contrapposto with its left arm raised. The figure's left hand once held a spear.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/bd27ea65b6b6e23fe0b152b2f4004dc9.jpg)
![Figure standing upright with its left leg stepping forward and its arms by its side.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/552abfb9eac1a5e9df7ee0e25b7d779f.jpg)
![Figure kneeling down with its right arm raised behind, holding a discus.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/99bce45c8bd6bb0adcf1055325417397.jpg)
